sizing_policy.description: fixed fraction of current equity per held name

supersedes.goal_strat3_breadth_gate: GOAL-STRAT3 (planned per-symbol breadth gate) is superseded by SEL-EV1: the breadth lens is wrong for a strategy designed to concentrate. The ZEC lesson is reframed as the rotation/diversity check. The breadth-gate idea is deferred, not deleted.
